is.one_liner: Unified Activity supertype substrate — quests, missions, badges, raffles, completion tracking
scope: Define sealed Activity schemas (quest defs, completion criteria, badge shapes, raffle schemas)
Expose typed ports — IQuestEngine, IBadgeService, IRaffleService
Offer an MCP agent surface (who completed Quest X? what badges does wallet Y hold?)
Ship a headless quest-engine extracted from CubQuests

is_not: Does NOT run a Discord bot or Next.js app — the CubQuests dashboard stays the operator surface
Will NOT be a Postgres schema or an indexer — it consumes indexed reads
Does NOT own dashboard chrome — only the headless engine + contracts
_comment: composes_with + acvp_invariants omitted pending port-schema sealing (ADR-007 App A.2 / ADR-008 §D-11). Worlds compose [activities-api, mint-api, TreasuryPort] per README. The mcp transport block is added at deployment.
